description: White is in a world of trouble, with two groups on the verge of capture. Do your best! Thanks to Piccolo for pointing out a few problems in the original version.

(;W[sb];B[sa]LB[nh:X]C[Ko. Please make a ko threat by playing at X.FORCE];W[nh];B[mh]C[Black answers the threat.]
